description: In ESA SNAP Desktop, perform a domain-restricted classification on the loaded Landsat multispectral image to analyze water bodies without land interference. Create a binary water mask and at least two masked spectral bands where land pixels are assigned NaN values. Execute a K-Means Cluster Analysis using only these masked bands as the source. Save the clustered product in BEAM-DIMAP format to /home/ga/snap_exports/water_clusters.dim and export it as a GeoTIFF to /home/ga/snap_exports/water_clusters.tif.
